messages.content: Legacy modernization context: controller mixes data access and business rules directly.
Application-scope DI refactoring context: tight coupling to application.userService in handlers.
Legacy example: service returns raw query and leaks repository format into controller.
Legacy detection pattern: god workflow object with unrelated responsibilities.
Legacy performance/context pattern: repeated business checks in controllers instead of single service method.
Return a standardized success/error response struct from a service method.
Compose multiple repository calls inside a single service method.
Wrap a multi-step service operation in a transaction block to ensure consistency.
DI/1 property injection pattern in a FW/1 service component.
Dispatch a domain event after a state-changing service operation.
Filter and transform a collection of member structs in a service layer method using CF2025 arrow function syntax.

safetyNote: Arrow function syntax (=>) requires CF2025+. Use traditional anonymous function(x){} syntax in CF10-CF2021.
